sources.title: They Wait Dvdrip
sources.description: A young mother and her six-year-old son come face to face with the mysteries of two murders and a great crime against the Chinese community into which they have recently arrived from Shanghai.

metadata.Plot: A couple returns to North America for a family funeral, having lived in Shanghai, China for the previous six years. Soon after they arrive, their son Jamie begins to see ghosts and suffer possession by one of the living dead, and it all ties in with the Chinese festival of Ghost Month, when the doors of hell supposedly open and angry spirits are given the chance to terrorize the living.
metadata.Writer: Trevor Markwart, Carl Bessai, Doug Taylor
metadata.Actors: Jaime King, Terry Chen, Pei-Pei Cheng
